title: Cuneiform Tablet #0845: Middle Assyrian Mathematical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Mathematical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records mathematical matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
